title.en: Feeding the Pet in the Morning

phrases.en: Her hungry cat waits patiently by the empty bowl.
phrases.zh: 她饥饿的猫耐心地在空碗旁等着。

phrases.en: It meows softly and rubs against her leg.
phrases.zh: 它轻轻地喵喵叫，蹭着她的腿。

phrases.en: She takes out the bag of dry food.
She scoops a small cup of food.
She pours it carefully into the clean bowl.
phrases.zh: 她小心地把它倒进干净的碗里。

phrases.en: Then she picks up the water dish.
She empties the old water into the sink.
She refills it with fresh, cool water.
phrases.zh: 她重新倒满新鲜、清凉的水。

phrases.en: She sets both bowls down gently on the floor.
phrases.zh: 她把两个碗轻轻地放在地板上。

phrases.en: The cat eats its breakfast quickly.
phrases.zh: 猫很快地吃完它的早餐。

phrases.en: Finally, she wipes up the spilled crumbs.
phrases.zh: 最后，她擦掉洒落的食物碎屑。
